articles.title: Trader Nets $1.60 Million as New Solana Meme Coin Soars 500%
articles.description: Solana has welcomed the emergence of a new meme coin called WEN. This digital asset generated significant community interest after being distributed to over a million wallets. Capitalizing on WEN’s heightened excitement, a savvy trader successfully amassed approximately $1.60 million in profits within 14 hours. articles.title: U.S. Lawmakers Warn National Debt is ‘Greatest Threat’ to Country as it Surpasses $34 Trillion

articles.title: Hedera (HBAR) Shines: Record-Breaking 164 Million Daily Transactions, Market Cap Reaches $2.9 Billion
articles.description: Hedera (HBAR), the open-source Proof-of-Stake (PoS) blockchain network, has made significant strides in the fourth quarter (Q4) of 2023, according to a recent report by Messari. The network’s performance showcased notable growth in key metrics, outpacing the crypto market. Hedera Outpaces Crypto Market With 78% QoQ Increase During Q4 2023, Hedera’s circulating market cap experienced a 78% quarter-over-quarter (QoQ) increase, reaching $2.9 billion.
